channel.title: Harness-Engineering on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Harness-Engineering on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: AGENTS.md Practice Guide — Map, Commands, and Verification Loops for AI Coding Agents
item.description: AGENTS.md is a README for AI agents: a compact project map that exposes hard rules, build/test commands, verification loops, and deeper documentation links so agents can understand, modify, and verify code without relying on hidden tribal knowledge.
